_comment: Common issues & troubleshooting per station. Edit freely - the future Issues panel will render this file directly, no code changes needed. See README.md in this folder for the format.

SIF-401.title: Loader not feeding containers (example entry - replace me)
SIF-401.symptoms: Alert says a container loader has no containers even though it is stocked.
steps: Check that canisters are seated flat in the loader.
Press the bottommost canister against the wall of the loader.
If the alert persists, remove and restack the canisters.
